title: Dong Dong's random creation
description: magic and energy,new ore,new dimension,new tool and weapon type.
body:
This is a typical mcreato mod.No theme.Just add elements randomly.

Use bookget command to get tutorial book.
![bookget command](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6487b1a4999bc3bfde196415f8f8893d33f3a1d.png)
use function key (default:
z) can quickly climb ladder (block with tag:minecraft:climbable,dongdongmod:ladder,quark:ladders)

dimension

in this dimension you can fight wiht two new boss.there are 5 new ores.And have 4 new mobs ,mang new plants.
![dimension](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/335b2b9c5c3866be72ea155fbeb846f65a269d3d.png)
armor

tungsteel armor can offer strong defense force but it make you moving slower.

builder armor suit can offer fly ability but make you cant attack.

explosive armor can explode but not immune explosive damage.
![armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c7ec2259f94f9761b99c48f9c21abfda29d01ccd.png)

weapon

now we have more shields

rapier can lunge when attack

katana can flick projectile

claw have quickly attack speed and low damage
![weapon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6255f9cb746685d2cdcb0159e1ff35056789ec5.png)

hammer can broke stone 3x3

more shears

Universal tool

![tool](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0412ef4a9e639e64dff121002f06b50aca8827a2.png)

magic

add new system called iodine magic

you can use point to level up iodine level

level will affect bless buff time

you also can use staff to use magic include fire ball and Summoning
![magic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b900c88431098179a5dff2e849d259d3e0e4b07b.png)

function block

add simple electric system

use forge energy

we have 3 energy pipe and 1 Electric box

cooler can make water to snow snow to ice

Harvesters and planters.

pulverizer can 1 ore to 2dusts

blood altar can use health trade magic

repair altar can repair item by use magic
![function block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4dc5c9aa97c7868d316065488e288dec7a832aa2.png)

boss

living doll is a earth boss.

he will use 2 sword and summoning magic and tp magic

ofanim is a sky boss

he will shoot light ball to you.

summon light pillar

change position skill
![boss](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84d1c6139409541ced9aa19abfb4ec7899fb5e60.png)

mob

friendly steve can  tamed by bread

Treeman will fly away attackers.

chaos will make you screen dirty

plane can be rided

guard will shoot posion bullet quickly
![mob](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/568aceda73f762fbdb30da56466fb4c221444659.png)
